## Summary

Creates the next Final Review UI/runtime wiring PR after #727.

This PR currently captures the implementation contract for wiring the Workbench and Final Review UI to the Final Review runtime:

- Workbench decisions must capture selected text, source excerpt, and source location snapshots.
- Final Review Apply must call the apply endpoint.
- Final Review export controls must link to clean, marked, and changelog TXT exports.
- Apply must still block safely when snapshots are missing or no longer match the source manuscript version.

## Product doctrine

Final Review should become the author-confirmed finishing path:

- Workbench captures evidence-backed decision snapshots.
- Final Review shows the marked preview and changelog.
- Apply creates a derived manuscript version only when source/replacement snapshots are safe.
- Export provides clean draft, marked review copy, and changelog outputs.

## Important boundary

This branch is intentionally opened as the next PR shell so the work is tracked immediately after #727 merged. The UI/button wiring and Workbench snapshot capture should land in follow-up commits on this PR branch before merge.

## Unauthorized Input Sources

None. The intended implementation uses only authenticated user-owned manuscript/evaluation IDs, Workbench opportunity data, and existing Final Review runtime endpoints.

## Internal Process Leakage

No internal process, worker traces, provider details, token usage, or pipeline diagnostics should surface. UI language remains author-facing: Apply, Export clean draft, Export marked copy, Export changelog, blocked reason.

## Input → Action → Output

Input: Workbench opportunity, selected A/B/C or custom decision, manuscript/evaluation IDs.

Action: snapshot selected text/source excerpt/location; sync to ledger; call apply/export endpoints from Final Review.

Output: synced ledger snapshots, apply result/blocked reason, and downloadable clean/marked/changelog exports.

## Public-Safe Quality/Status Metrics

Only author-facing states should appear: pending, synced, apply blocked, applied, exported. No model/runtime/internal metrics.

## Runtime/Pipeline Expansion

No evaluation, scoring, WAVE/Golden Spine, OpenAI, Perplexity, worker, queue, or background pipeline runtime is expanded. This PR wires UI controls to existing persisted/runtime surfaces.

## Latency Impact

Low. Adds client-side snapshot fields and calls existing lightweight apply/export endpoints. No model calls or background jobs.

## Scope

UI/runtime wiring only.

No new evaluation logic.
No new revision generation logic.
No pricing/credits.
No Agent Readiness or Storygate runtime changes.

## Acceptance criteria before merge

- Workbench sync payload includes `selectedText`, `sourceExcerpt`, and `sourceLocation` for accepted/custom decisions.
- Final Review Apply button calls `POST /api/final-review/apply`.
- Final Review shows applied/blocked result.
- Final Review export controls link to clean, marked, and changelog TXT endpoints.
- Runtime safety block remains intact for missing/mismatched snapshots.
